title: Income Tax (Foreign Organisations) (Approval and Exemption) Order, 2009

sections.heading: Full text
sections.text:
Supplement to the .Republic of Zambia Government
Gazette dated Friday, 16th January. 2009 19
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
STATl!fORY INSTRUMENT No. 2 OF-2009
The Income Tax Act
(Laws, Volume 19, Cap. 323)
The Income Tax (Foreign Organisations) (Approval
and Exemption) Order, 2009
IN EXERCISE of the powers contained in section .fifieen of the
Income Tax Act, the following Order is hereby made:
I. This Order may be cited as the Income Tax (Foreign Title and
Organisations) (Approval and Exemption) Order, 2009. WIIIIIDuilliJt
2 . (1) The following Organisations are hereby approved for Approval
the purpose ofexemption from tax: and
exemption
(a) the Afrrican Development bank; and from tax
(b) the African Export Import Bank.
(2) The Income of the institutions approved in paragraph (2) of
this Order shall be exempt from tax under subparagraph (5) of
paragraph 5 of part Ill of the Second Schedule to the Act.
DR. s. MusOKOTWANE,
Minister of Finance and
LUSAKA National Planning
9th January, 2009
